prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `6d1d5c90`.
codex_response:
Implemented `6d1d5c90`. The rule is: remove column 0, find the row of the lone `2`, then rotate the remaining six rows downward by that row index. I used the `sonnet45` hint only after simplifying it to that shift rule; I discarded the `opus46` hint because it incorrectly claims the `2` row moves to the top.

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_6d1d5c90/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_6d1d5c90/verifier.py#L4), [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_6d1d5c90/generator.py#L183), and [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_6d1d5c90/notes.md). The generator builds dense 6x6 six-color bodies with short horizontal runs and moderate row-to-row continuity, then derives the input by cyclically shifting that body and prepending the `6/2` marker column. No new shared primitive was needed.

Validation passed: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and I visually checked the preview output. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6d1d5c90/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6d1d5c90/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6d1d5c90/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6d1d5c90/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6d1d5c90/previews/preview_03.png).
